title: aconitum × exaltatum
intro: Aconitum × exaltatum, also known as the monk's hood or wolf's bane, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Aconitum genus of flowering plants. Traditionally, Aconitum × exaltatum has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aconitum × exaltatum include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever and rheumatism. Aconitum × exaltatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
